ab: a daman i, marenang mi kan namalri muka kirepanauwa kan namalri na maranak.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: kurepanana tu dapalr kan namalri na maranak.
“mibuwang tu saub kana ruma.” kema kaniyam i namalr na maranak.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: a semaseket i, mutani kemay i sausaub taytaw.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: kemasu dratu patraka dra gung aw dra puran i namalri. tu berayay i namalri na maranak.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: kadru mi i kiyaedrengan madradrayar kan namalri na maranak. benabati dra sadru dra batibatiyan.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他說了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: a muwaburek mi i, “asatr yu lra aw bangesar yu lra!” kema semakal kanku i namalri na maranak.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: “ama, an inaba lra nu dapalr i, alamu lra uwadrangi i ruma!” kema ku kan namalri na maranak.
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”
